---
title: "Foxmir Blog"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: latest-listing
    contents:
      - publish/Life
      - publish/Reports
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 5
  - id: life-listing
    contents: publish/Life
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: reports-listing
    contents: publish/Reports
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-HOMEPAGE: edit folders/posts in Obsidian, not this file. -->
<!-- BUILD-ID: 20260510054310 -->


this is the HOME page.


<section class="home-section">
<h2 class="home-section-heading">Latest</h2>

:::{#latest-listing}
:::
</section>

<section class="home-section">
<h2 class="home-section-heading">Life</h2>

:::{#life-listing}
:::
</section>

<section class="home-section">
<h2 class="home-section-heading">Reports</h2>

:::{#reports-listing}
:::
</section>
